description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a white perimeter wall and lush green trees, providing privacy and shade. The house features a flat roof and a spacious layout with multiple rooms visible from above, including what appears to be a living area, bedrooms, and a bathroom. Large windows and glass doors are present, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor garden spaces. The property includes a paved driveway or walkway leading up to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the wall. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of tall and medium-sized trees, as well as manicured grass areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white perimeter wall, and lush trees, featuring large windows and a spacious, open layout.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the backyard garden, trees, and the open layout of the rooms.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, showcasing the main entryway, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, revealing the distribution of rooms, the flat roof, and the dense tree coverage on one side.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the length of the building, the flat roof, and the tall trees near the wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway integrated into the wall with a simple door, paved approach, and minimal decorative elements
